cases.description: Line chart of order amounts over time from evals_orders
cases.input: Show me a line chart of order amounts over time from {EVALS_DATABASE}.evals_orders using order_date on the x-axis and amount on the y-axis

cases.description: Pie chart breaking down orders by product category
cases.input: Plot {EVALS_DATABASE}.evals_orders as a pie chart using product_category for the slice labels and amount for the values.

cases.description: Polar area chart of order amounts by product category
cases.input: Create a polar area chart showing order amounts by product_category from {EVALS_DATABASE}.evals_orders

cases.description: Radar chart of salary by department in evals_employees
cases.input: Draw a spider chart from {EVALS_DATABASE}.evals_employees using department as the axis labels and salary as the values.

cases.description: Time-series data should use line chart, not radar
cases.input: Plot how order amounts change over time from {EVALS_DATABASE}.evals_orders using order_date on the x-axis

cases.description: Proportion/share breakdown should use pie chart over polar
cases.input: Use a pie chart to show {EVALS_DATABASE}.evals_orders with product_category as labels and amount as the values.

cases.description: Chart request with no table or data provided — agent must ask for clarification
Direct pie chart from table — no pre-query needed since plot tools read tables directly
cases.input: Give me a pie chart of amount by product_category from {EVALS_DATABASE}.evals_orders

cases.description: Agent must ask which table to plot
cases.input: Create a line chart of sales over time

cases.description: User asks for a non‑existent plot tool
cases.input: Show me the network topology as a diagram
